The Delhi High Court on Thursday issued notice to Union Minister Hardeep Puri’s daughter Himayani Puri in RTI activist Kunal Shukla's plea to lift an earlier injunction by which articles linking her to child sex offender Jeffrey Epstein were blocked [ Himayani Puri V Kunal Shukla ].
